title: The Alaska Thunderfuck Extra Special Comedy Special
original_title: The Alaska Thunderfuck Extra Special Comedy Special
overview: Star of stage and screen Alaska Thunderfuck proudly presents "Alaska's Extra Special Comedy Special." Featuring some of Alaska's greatest musical hits, exciting special guests, and a series of comedic jokes.
